etymology.description: semantic 木(木) (mù, "wood") + phonetic 僉(僉) (qiān) -> inspect
etymology.interpretation: The character 檢(檢) (jiǎn, "inspect") combines the semantic 木(木) (mù, "wood") suggesting a wooden tool or framework that aids in inspection, with the phonetic 僉(僉) (qiān), which provides the sound. The concept of inspecting or checking can be linked to using tools or frameworks to thoroughly examine items.
etymology.simplification: 檢(檢) was simplified by replacing 僉(僉) with 佥(佥), reducing complexity while retaining phonetic and structural similarity.

examples.chinese: 医生会仔细检查你的伤口(醫生會仔細檢查你的傷口)。
examples.pinyin: Yīshēng huì zǐxì jiǎnchá nǐ de shāngkǒu.
examples.english: The doctor will carefully examine your wound.

examples.chinese: 他们正在检查文件(他們正在檢查文件)。
我们需要定期检查设备(我們需要定期檢查設備)。
examples.english: We need to regularly inspect the equipment.
